structure.unit: Waters of the State, Ports and Harbors
Erosion and Sediment Control Law for Localities Not Administering a Virginia Erosion and Stormwater Management Program

law.text: Each VESCP authority shall report to the Department, in a method such as an online reporting system and on a time schedule established by the Department, a listing of each land-disturbing activity for which a plan has been approved by the VESCP under this article.
